ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Player name */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player position */,
  "team" TEXT /* Player team */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Player age */,
  "height" REAL /* Player height */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Game outcome */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Player who participated in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitches" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Game in which the pitch was thrown */,
  "pitch_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the pitch */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Count of the pitch */,
  "pitch_location" TEXT /* Location of the pitch */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Player who threw the pitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_metrics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch thrown (e.g., Four-seam, Cutter, Changeup) */,
  "ip" TEXT /* Innings pitched */,
  "k_percent" REAL /* Strikeout percentage */,
  "bb_percent" REAL /* Walk percentage */,
  "hr_fb_percent" REAL /* Home run per fly ball percentage */,
  "gb_percent" REAL /* Ground ball percentage */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "fip" REAL /* Fielding independent pitching */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Average velocity of the pitch */,
  "spin_rate" REAL /* Average spin rate of the pitch */,
  "stuff_plus" REAL /* Stuff+ rating (advanced metric) */,
  "whiff_plus" REAL /* Whiff+ rating (advanced metric) */,
  "bip_plus" REAL /* BIP+ rating (advanced metric) */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Game in which the metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "pitch_type", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* User name */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., analyst, coach, front office) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearable_technology_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable technology data entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Player who generated the data */,
  "heart_rate" REAL /* Heart rate */,
  "blood_pressure" REAL /* Blood pressure */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Game in which the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_analysis" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Player who generated the trend */,
  "metric" TEXT /*  Metric being analyzed (e.g., ERA, FIP) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Game in which the trend was analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
column_names: Player who participated in the game
Game in which the pitch was thrown
Type of pitch thrown (e.g., Four-seam, Cutter, Changeup)
Home run per fly ball percentage
Average spin rate of the pitch
Game in which the metrics were recorded
User role (e.g., analyst, coach, front office)
Unique identifier for each wearable technology data entry
Game in which the data was recorded
Unique identifier for each trend analysis entry
Game in which the trend was analyzed
